ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, ETF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of portfolio (e.g., retirement, growth) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the portfolio (e.g., capital appreciation, income generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio containing the holding */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument held */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Cost basis of the financial instrument */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the financial instrument was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade that the order belongs to */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument ordered */,
  "limit_price" REAL /* Limit price of the order */,
  "stop_price" REAL /* Stop price of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that the performance record belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns of the portfolio during the performance period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
